history.content: Quick startup state: task and schedule systems are currently unavailable in this snapshot, so there are no live task/schedule items I can verify right now. Today’s notes highlight that memory sync correctly no-op’d on sparse days, clarified runtime directive behavior, and documented a hang root cause where `browser_send_to_telegram` was an unknown tool and no immediate fallback was executed. Where things left off: the next priority is tightening the X→Telegram fallback path and keeping low-token compaction/reporting robust when logs are intermittent.
